nl_query: Show all scripts where the scan was performed by a scanner device registered at a campus different from the campus where the exam was scheduled, indicating a potential logistics or data entry error.
failed_sql:
SELECT s.id, s.urn, s.exam_id, s.course_id, s.student_id, s.bundle_id, s.s3_key, s.dek_id, s.lifecycle_status, s.scan_status, s.evaluation_status, s.block_status, sd.device_name, au.code AS campus_code, au.name AS campus_name
FROM   answer_script s
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = s.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
JOIN   faculty_cache fc ON fc.id = sa.faculty_cache_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = fc.department_id
JOIN   scanner_device sd ON sd.id = sa.assigned_by
WHERE  au.code <> (SELECT esc.campus_id FROM exam_schedule_cache esc WHERE esc.id = s.exam_id)
ORDER  BY s.exam_date DESC
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): answer_script.exam_date. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
